description.value:
Soot-ink marginalia from hearth-scribes — Askmål hearth-scribes annotate every page of their records in soot-ink that can only be read by firelight; they discovered the ink also reacts to magical and psionic residue, making it invaluable to investigators.

Effect: You gain an edge on tests made to discern magic or psionic influence, to interpret omens, or to recall relevant lore.

Rules: Edge; Tests.

project.prerequisites: An implement of at least basic quality; a vial of Askmål hearth-scribe soot-ink
